attacking_style: Lacks consistent attacking profile; more reactive than proactive. Shows occasional ability to bridge to breakaways on climbs, but rarely initiates decisive moves from favorites groups.
team_tactics: Bora positions him as co-leader or protected rider with strong climbing domestique support (Majka noted in 2018). Team depth issues become critical when crashes eliminate roster options mid-race.
terrain_preference: Pure climbing suits him best on mountain top finishes when staying with favorites. Unexpectedly competent on gravel terrain. Exposed on technical descents and crash-prone stages where bike handling matters.
vulnerability: Crashes repeatedly at critical race junctures (3 documented DNS/abandon instances). Cracks prematurely on summit finishes when form is off, dropping well before expected for GC contender status.
key_patterns: Crashes out of contention repeatedly: three documented mid-race abandonments from top-10 GC positions (2020-2021).
Premature cracking on climbs when struggling: dropped 2 miles from summit finish in 2023 Vuelta.
Shows unexpected versatility on non-standard terrain: attacked successfully on gravel at 2021 Giro.
Demonstrated underrated finishing speed: closed gaps in Tour de Pologne finale despite non-sprinter status.
Team depth becomes critical weakness when attrition occurs: multiple Bora crises noted post-crashes.
form_trajectory: negative: Most recent 2023 observation shows premature collapse on summit finish as co-leader, suggesting declining GC competitiveness
